summary: Iteration 310 - Truth-vs-Illusion Repair Sprint Verification. All fixes verified: 1) ZERO placehold.co URLs in backend APIs (gallery, explore, user-jobs, active-chains), 2) Gallery has 48+ real items with R2 thumbnails, 3) Explore has 12+ items with R2 presigned URLs, 4) User-jobs excludes ORPHANED status, 5) Universal negative prompts present in all 5 image generation services, 6) More Tools label visible (rgba(255,255,255,0.8)), 7) Story Video form controls fully visible (white text rgb(255,255,255)), 8) Resume Your Story shows truthful 'Preview unavailable' fallback.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_engine.py (Line 172-183): UNIVERSAL_NEGATIVE_PROMPT constant correctly defined with comprehensive quality guards
photo_to_comic.py (Lines 94-108): UNIVERSAL_NEGATIVE_PROMPTS array with 30+ quality/safety terms
photo_to_comic.py (Line 1713-1714): Fake URL filter explicitly excludes placehold.co URLs in active-chains response
comix_ai.py: COMIX_NEGATIVE_PROMPT injected at character gen (line 225), panel gen (line 389), and page gen (line 688)
comic_storybook.py: STORYBOOK_NEGATIVE_PROMPT at line 36, injected at line 511
gif_maker.py: GIF_NEGATIVE_PROMPT at line 35, injected at lines 676 and 952
pipeline_routes.py (Line 682): user-jobs query explicitly excludes ORPHANED status with $nin filter
public_routes.py (Line 367): explore base_filter requires output_url exists and is not null/empty
ResumeYourStory.jsx (Lines 30-51): ChainPreview component filters placehold.co URLs and shows ImageOff + 'Preview unavailable'
StylePreview.jsx: All 20+ style previews use CSS gradient backgrounds only — zero external image URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Truth-vs-illusion sprint complete. All placehold.co URLs removed from backend (7 instances across 4 files) and frontend (25+ instances in StylePreview.jsx). Data repair script marked 19 zombie jobs as ORPHANED. User-jobs and explore endpoints filter correctly. Universal negative prompts in all 5 image gen paths. Story Video form controls have white text (rgb(255,255,255)), More Tools label has white/80 text (rgba(255,255,255,0.8)). Gallery returns data in 'videos' key.

zero_placehold_co_in_gallery.evidence: API test: /api/pipeline/gallery returns 48 items, all with R2 presigned URLs, zero placehold.co

zero_placehold_co_in_explore.evidence: API test: /api/public/explore returns 12 items with R2 thumbnails, zero placehold.co

zero_placehold_co_in_user_jobs.evidence: pytest test passed with zero placehold.co URLs in response

zero_placehold_co_in_active_chains.evidence: pytest test passed; photo_to_comic.py line 1714 explicitly filters placehold.co

user_jobs_excludes_orphaned.evidence: pytest test passed; pipeline_routes.py line 682 has '$nin': ['ORPHANED'] filter

universal_negative_prompts.evidence: 5/5 image generation services have negative prompt constants: pipeline_engine.py (UNIVERSAL_NEGATIVE_PROMPT), photo_to_comic.py (UNIVERSAL_NEGATIVE_PROMPTS), comix_ai.py (COMIX_NEGATIVE_PROMPT), comic_storybook.py (STORYBOOK_NEGATIVE_PROMPT), gif_maker.py (GIF_NEGATIVE_PROMPT)

more_tools_label_visibility.evidence: Playwright test: color=rgba(255,255,255,0.8), opacity=1, fontWeight=500 - white text clearly visible

story_video_form_controls_visibility.evidence: Playwright test: Animation Style button color=rgb(255,255,255) (pure white), 6 styles visible, 5 ages visible, 5 voices visible, all interactive

resume_your_story_truthful_fallback.evidence: Code review: ResumeYourStory.jsx lines 31,48-49 show ImageOff icon + 'Preview unavailable' when no valid preview_url (excluding placehold.co)

gallery_real_content.evidence: UI test: 48 gallery cards with 49 real R2 images, category tabs showing All(58), 2D Cartoon(42), Watercolor(9), Anime(4)

explore_real_content.evidence: UI test: 12 items with R2 presigned thumbnails showing real creations like 'A Cat's Big City Adventure', 'Baby Whale's Beautiful Ocean Song'
